name: Lamb & Spinach Pocket Sandwiches
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix lamb, onion, soy sauce, mustard, celery seed, dill seed, and parsley.
2. Shape 8 patties, each about 4 inches wide; place egg and olives equally in the center of 4 pocket bread rounds.
3. Pinch remaining patties on top to seal the sandwiches.
4. Place the sealed sandwiches on a rack in a broiler pan, 4 inches from the heat.
5. Broil until heated through and cooked to your taste, about 5 minutes per side for medium heat.
6. Fill bread equally with meat, spinach, cucumber, and sauce.
Per serving:
628 calories; 41 grams protein; 30 grams fat (10 grams saturated fat); 48 grams carbohydrates; 1,420 milligrams sodium; 207 milligrams cholesterol.
